This pack contains 70 premium latex balloons, perfect for decorating any celebration or party. What colours do the balloons come in? The balloons come in a vibrant assortment of seven colours: green, yellow, pink, orange, blue, red, and purple, adding a splash of colour to any event. What size are the balloons when inflated? Each balloon inflates to 10.5 inches, ideal for creating festive balloon arches or vibrant displays. Are these balloons suitable for a variety of celebrations? Absolutely! These multicoloured balloons are perfect for children's parties, birthdays, baby showers, and more, making any event festive. Can these balloons be used for party games? Yes, these balloons are great for games. Fill them with surprises for a thrilling balloon burst challenge at your next party.
